identity_baseline: An experienced Earthman fighter who undergoes a physical metamorphosis.
physical_build: Highly fit, athletic human male with superhuman agility.
movement_language: Superhumanly agile; capable of massive vertical leaps (up to thirty feet) and leaping over moving objects like chariots.
stable_visual_summary: An experienced Earthman fighter characterized by extreme physical fitness and superhuman agility. His visual identity is defined by a significant metamorphosis; he transitions from an armed, clothed combatant to a naked state following his transformation. He moves with exceptional grace and power, capable of performing massive vertical leaps of up to thirty feet.
state_variants: Original Form: Clothed and carrying weapons.
relationship_notes: Associated with Sola, Tars Tarkas, and Woola.
continuity_constraints: Must maintain the distinction between his original clothed/armed state and his post-metamorphosis naked state.
Movement must reflect superhuman leaping capabilities.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific visual details of the metamorphosis process are not defined.
Exact age or facial features are not provided in evidence.
